items.title:
We've resolved an issue where Fable was not selectable as a model within https://t.co/FiDD5WA3ik or Claude Code for a 30 minute period.

You may need to restart Claude Code. If Fable is not your defau
items.snippet:
We've resolved an issue where Fable was not selectable as a model within https://t.co/FiDD5WA3ik or Claude Code for a 30 minute period.

You may need to restart Claude Code. If Fable is not your default model afterwards, you should reselect it with /model.

items.title:
Claude Code's /code-review now has effort levels, with the review rewritten at every one.

Low effort beats other code review tools on findings at a fraction of the token cost. High effort delivers si
items.snippet:
Claude Code's /code-review now has effort levels, with the review rewritten at every one.

Low effort beats other code review tools on findings at a fraction of the token cost. High effort delivers significantly higher recall when you want to go deeper.

You pick the tradeoff. https://t.co/uT2K7jfXq

items.snippet:

items.title:
Claude Code on desktop now has an in-app browser.

Claude can pull up docs, designs, or any other site. It can read, click through, and interact the same way it does with your local dev servers.

It's
items.snippet:
Claude Code on desktop now has an in-app browser.

Claude can pull up docs, designs, or any other site. It can read, click through, and interact the same way it does with your local dev servers.

It's sandboxed and configurable: you choose whether sessions persist. https://t.co/Jbc21OP0vJ

Top-tier performance on coding and tool use at Sonnet pricing, with a 1M context window.

It's the new default in Claude Code for Pro users, and available everywhere on the C
items.snippet:
Claude Sonnet 5 is here.

Top-tier performance on coding and tool use at Sonnet pricing, with a 1M context window.

It's the new default in Claude Code for Pro users, and available everywhere on the Claude Platform, including the API and Managed Agents.

Claude Tag is the next evolution of agents.

It's a proactive, multiplayer agent with memory and identity, built on top of Claude Code.

Learn more about how Claude Tag works and best practices for us
items.snippet:
Claude Tag is the next evolution of agents.

It's a proactive, multiplayer agent with memory and identity, built on top of Claude Code.

Learn more about how Claude Tag works and best practices for using it in this deep dive. https://t.co/1C5eotdIgM

items.title:
When Claude is working in a channel with four people, whose credentials does it use?

The answer: its own. When tagging Claude, Claude gets provisioned like any other teammate, with its own credential
items.snippet:
When Claude is working in a channel with four people, whose credentials does it use?

The answer: its own. When tagging Claude, Claude gets provisioned like any other teammate, with its own credentials.

We call this access model "agent identity". Here's how it works: 🧵 https://t.co/UveJWgOQEx

items.title:
Earlier today, ~3% of Claude Code Max and Pro users hit a bug that showed an incorrect weekly usage limit, and in some cases blocked them from sending messages. 

This is fixed, and we're resetting 5-
items.snippet:
Earlier today, ~3% of Claude Code Max and Pro users hit a bug that showed an incorrect weekly usage limit, and in some cases blocked them from sending messages. 

This is fixed, and we're resetting 5-hour and weekly limits for everyone affected. Apologies for the disruption.

Available today on Team and
items.snippet:
Artifacts are now live in Claude Code.

Available today on Team and Enterprise plans.

items.snippet:

items.title:
Claude Code and Claude Design now sync both ways.

Run /design-sync to pull your design system into your repo and build against your real components, or push what you've built back into Claude Design
items.snippet:
Claude Code and Claude Design now sync both ways.

Run /design-sync to pull your design system into your repo and build against your real components, or push what you've built back into Claude Design and keep editing on the canvas.

items.title:
Claude Fable 5 is our first generally available Mythos-class model. 

It ships with new safety classifiers that may flag certain prompts in dual-use domains like cyber and bio.

We've added fallbacks:
items.snippet:
Claude Fable 5 is our first generally available Mythos-class model. 

It ships with new safety classifiers that may flag certain prompts in dual-use domains like cyber and bio.

We've added fallbacks: a refused request retries on Claude Opus 4.8 instead of dead-ending. https://t.co/iL1Rd6H5pJ
